name: Apocatequil
desc: While this card is face-up on the field, it is Level 5 if you control a face-up Tuner monster. When this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard, you can select and Special Summon 1 "Oracle of the Sun" from your Graveyard.
mnst_eff: While this card is face-up on the field, it is Level 5 if you control a face-up Tuner monster. When this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard, you can select and Special Summon 1 "Oracle of the Sun" from your Graveyard.
eff: While this card is face-up on the field, it is Level 5 if you control a face-up Tuner monster. When this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard, you can select and Special Summon 1 "Oracle of the Sun" from your Graveyard.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
